Setting.name: approvalItems.lineBreak
Setting.label: Display approvalItem attributes with line breaks
Setting.helpText: Split comma-separated attribute values into separate lines in approval work items

Setting.name: approvalItems.hideApplication
Setting.label: Hide application column
Setting.helpText: Hide the application column in approval item grids

Setting.name: approvalItems.hideNativeIdentity
Setting.label: Hide native identity column
Setting.helpText: Hide the native identity column in approval item grids

Setting.name: approvalItems.changeHighlight
Setting.label: Highlight changes by operation type
Setting.helpText: Color-code approval item rows based on operation (Create=green, Modify=blue, Delete=red)
